title: pinus holophylla
intro: Pinus holophylla, also known as the Chinese white pine, is a species of pine tree native to China. The medicinal properties of Pinus holophylla include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which are often used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Pinus holophylla include its ability to reduce stress, improve sleep, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herb in traditional Chinese medicine. Pinus holophylla can be prepared as tea, decoction, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
